summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 25 open pull requests. No shared canonical was selected. Closure, merge, fix, and raise-pr paths are blocked by job permissions or missing merge preflight; two security-shaped PRs are routed to central security handling; maintainer-owned/draft/active-author items are scoped needs_human decisions.

actions.reason: Low-signal docs classification is plausible, but closeout is disabled and there is no shared canonical in this inventory shard.
Maintainer-owned implementation needs maintainer review rather than inventory automation.
Unique config behavior change with compatibility risk; not a duplicate or superseded PR in this shard.
Substantive unique bugfix with review context and delivery/session risk; keep out of inventory closeout.
Broad feature work with routing and config scope; not safe for duplicate or low-signal closeout.
Unique integration behavior change requiring normal review/proof; no closure path in this inventory shard.
Large active feature PR with dirty branch and author-followup signal needs maintainer judgment.
Small unique plugin fix; keep for normal review rather than inventory closeout.
Focused unique extension fix; no duplicate/superseded evidence.
Viable-looking independent UI fix, but this inventory run cannot merge or close related refs.
Template quality is weak, but closeout is not permitted and the patch has code/test content.
Focused provider-capability bugfix; no hydrated superseding PR in this shard.
Even though this is test-only, it directly concerns secrets and credential-leak policy coverage, so it should be quarantined from backlog cleanup automation.
Security-sensitive vulnerability-shaped fix must be handled by central security, not inventory cleanup.
Large maintainer-labeled docs/comment sweep needs maintainer judgment, not automated inventory classification beyond quarantine from closeout.
Active author work-in-progress signal blocks closeout or merge classification by this inventory worker.
Substantive unique gateway lifecycle fix; keep for normal review/proof.
Maintainer-owned draft approval-policy change should stay with maintainer review.
Broad Discord behavior feature/fix with delivery risk; no duplicate or superseded evidence.
Unique recovery behavior fix with session/message-delivery risk; keep for normal review.
Focused extension bugfix with proof label; no closeout or supersession evidence.
Unique active-memory behavior/config change; keep for normal review.
Recently updated broad active-author PR needs maintainer/author follow-up rather than automated inventory decision.
Focused CLI UX change; keep independent for normal review.
Larger unique skills CLI/loader feature; keep independent for normal review.
